notes: Test expectations for e2e-photos. Update manually when test assets change.

assetMetadata.notes: Keep EXIF-vs-visual orientation context close to fixtures. Some files are visually upright even when EXIF tags are missing or misleading.

files.name: face-detect-sample-01.jpg
files.visualOrientationNote: Visually upright; EXIF can be misleading for rotation assumptions.

files.name: 20230810_141737.jpg
files.visualOrientationNote: Used in rotation/similarity scenarios; verify visually instead of trusting EXIF only.

semanticSearch.notes: Prompt cases for semantic search ranking validation.

promptCases.prompt: Selfie of bald man with woman in glasses

unconfirmedFaceSearch.notes: Expectations for the 'include unconfirmed similar faces' toggle in semantic search. This scenario uses two non-rotated images for cleaner validation independent from rotation handling.

rotationBwSamples.notes: Paired B&W JPEGs in this folder (rotated-bw-01 from legacy dated filename; rotated-bw-02 renamed from scan0014.jpg). Not asserted by Playwright today; keep names stable for local rotation or path-metadata checks.

yoloFaceDetection.notes: Images that must yield at least one face when running local ONNX YOLOv12 Small (akanametov/yolo-face). Requires downloading yolov12s-face.onnx on first run.
